title: ExternalIngestEnvelope
description:
External/source-system evidence submission contract.

External integrations (Jira, Linear, Slack, GitHub webhooks, etc.) use this envelope to submit evidence, candidates, hints, and signals.  The envelope is **not** a `ToolRequest` — it enters the daemon through a separate validation path (the external ingest gate) and cannot carry or trigger:

- Review commands (`accept_candidate`, `reject_candidate`, `approve_signoff`, etc.) - Canonical decisions or event-store writes - Signoff approval or compliance resolution - Policy grants or local actor/session authority - Blocking governance results

The daemon validates the envelope, projects candidates/evidence through policy, and returns only advisory governance results.

candidate_hints.description: Candidate suggestions — advisory only, not canonical authority.

content_hash.description: Content hash (SHA-256). Daemon verifies if provided, computes if omitted.

ExternalCandidateHint.description: A candidate hint from an external source — advisory, not authority.

ExternalEvidenceItem.description: An evidence excerpt from an external source.
